name: sample-openapi
content:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Example API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: https://api.example.test
paths:
  /users/{userId}:
    get:
      summary: Get user by ID
      parameters:
        - name: userId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
  /users/{userId}/role:
    patch:
      summary: Update user role
      requestBody:
        required: true
  /search:
    get:
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
  /webhooks/callback:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
